sections.title: Mire-Dwelling Colossus
content: Ursaluna is a massive Pokémon that evolved through the influence of the swampy terrain of the Hisui region. It has the power to manipulate peat and soil.
It is a highly skilled tracker, using its powerful sense of smell to find objects buried deep underground. Its physical strength is unmatched among most forest-dwellers.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: Ursaluna serves as a high-bulk Ground/Normal type. While its standard form is a Master League niche, its Bloodmoon variant is feared for its overwhelming special attack pressure.

sections.title: Aromatic Grooming
content: Sprigatito frequently grooms its fur to keep it clean and to enhance the sweet scent it emits. This scent has a calming effect on those around it.
It can perform photosynthesis by absorbing sunlight through its fur. It is known to be quite temperamental and easily gets lonely.

sections.title: Floral Misdirection
content: Meowscarada uses its flower as a tool for misdirection. It can create illusions and perform incredible feats of magic to confuse its enemies.
It is a master of stealth, moving through the shadows with silent grace. Its signature move, Flower Trick, never misses its mark.

sections.title: Fiery Serenade
content: Skeledirge has a small, bird-like spirit made of fire that sits on its snout. The bird spirit changes shape when Skeledirge sings its powerful songs.
Its singing is said to be so soul-stirring that it can soothe even the most savage of beasts. In battle, its voice unleashes waves of intense heat.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A foundational pillar of the Great and Ultra League meta. Incinerate paired with Disarming Voice and Shadow Ball makes it a versatile and extremely tanky threat.

sections.title: Gelatinous Grooming
content: Quaxly is very particular about its appearance. Its feathers secrete a specialized gel that repels water and dirt, keeping it looking pristine.
It has incredibly strong legs and is a skilled swimmer. It is naturally tidy and becomes stressed if its environment is messy.

sections.title: Rhythmic Combat
content: Quaquaval uses its rhythmic dancing to confuse and overwhelm its enemies. Each of its movements is calculated to deliver a powerful strike.
Its feathers are as sharp as blades, and it can use them to slice through water and solid objects with ease.

sections.title: Transcendental Fury
content: Annihilape was born when Primeape's rage reached a point beyond the physical limit. Its physical body could no longer contain its anger, allowing it to transcend into a spectral form.
It is perpetually enraged, and its spectral power increases with every blow it receives. It is feared for its relentless and savage fighting style.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: The definitive 'Fighter' of the modern Great and Ultra League eras. Counter paired with Night Slash and Shadow Ball provides near-perfect coverage against almost every meta threat.

sections.title: Hoarding Instincts
content: Gimmighoul lives inside a chest filled with old coins. It uses its spectral power to manipulate those who approach, forcing them to collect more coins for its hoard.
In its Roaming Form, it is much more elusive and is often seen carrying a single gold coin across the Paldea region.

sections.title: Solid Gold Physiology
content: Gholdengo's body is composed entirely of 1,000 gold coins. It is said to be exceptionally friendly and enjoys the company of others.
Its solid gold body provides it with incredible durability and resistance to many different types of elemental attacks.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A premiere Steel/Ghost type in the Master League. Its Good as Gold ability in the main series translates to a high resistance profile in GO, making it an excellent counter to Fairy and Psychic types.

sections.title: Primeval Winged King
content: Koraidon is a mysterious Pokémon that is said to have come from the ancient past. It possesses overwhelming physical power and is capable of running at incredible speeds.
It can change its form to better suit its environment, allowing it to swim, climb, and fly with ease.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A devastating force in the Master League. Breaking Swipe's guaranteed Attack debuff and its high-damage Fighting/Dragon STAB moves make it a terrifying opponent for any team.

sections.title: Iron Serpent of the Future
content: Miraidon is a mysterious Pokémon that is said to have come from the distant future. Its body is composed of advanced mechanical parts that are powered by electricity.
It is capable of performing incredible feats of speed and agility, and its electrical attacks are powerful enough to overload standard power grids.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A high-speed Electric/Dragon pick in the Master League. Its ability to outpace opponents and deliver massive neutral damage makes it a premiere choice for fast-paced aggressive teams.

sections.title: Toxic Subjugation
content: Pecharunt uses its toxic chains to subjugate others, forcing them to do its bidding. It is a highly intelligent and manipulative Pokémon.
It is said to have been responsible for many of the legends and conflicts that have occurred throughout the history of the Paldea region.

sections.title: Mythological Baseline
content: Inspired by Momotarō of Japanese folklore, specifically the 'Peach Boy' who led a group of animal companions to fight off an ogre.
